name: hi_flow-marketplace
description: Marketplace for hi_flow Three-Phase Flow methodology skills (product spec, architecture spec, implementation plan, fitness functions, session handoff) for solo+AI development

plugins.name: hi_flow
plugins.description: Three-Phase Flow methodology for solo+AI development: feature-level product spec generation with hierarchical fork discovery (8-category probing taxonomy + HAZOP guidewords + premortem), and project-level product-spec for greenfield/active projects. Currently includes feature-spec and product-spec skills; arch-spec, impl-plan, fitness, sanity-check, handoff are parked for future iterations.
